project_type: Next.js 16 multi-tenant SaaS CRM with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
build_system: Next.js with npm scripts, Tailwind CSS 3.4, PostCSS
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify no build errors. 2. Run npx vitest run to ensure tests pass. 3. Verify CSS changes compile correctly.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js 22 available. node_modules already installed.
contribution_requirements: No specific CONTRIBUTING.md restrictions found for CSS changes.
key_patterns: Uses Tailwind utility classes extensively. CSS variables defined in globals.css for theming. User preferences (font-size, density) applied via data-* attributes on <html> element by UserPreferencesApplier component. Sidebar width uses arbitrary Tailwind values like w-[230px]. Components use cn() utility from lib/utils for conditional classNames.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages. components/ - React components organized by domain (tenant/, superadmin/, shared/, ui/). lib/ - Utilities, services. tests/ - vitest tests (unit/, integration/). globals.css defines CSS variables, base styles, and component classes.
